## Jane Smith Phone: +1-555-987-6543 Email: [jane@example.com](mailto:jane@example.com) LinkedIn: [https://linkedin.com/in/janesmith](https://linkedin.com/in/janesmith) GitHub: [https://github.com/janesmith](https://github.com/janesmith) Address: , , San Francisco, California, US ## Overview Full-stack engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and mentoring teams. ## Skills **Languages, Expert** TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go **Frontend, Expert** React, Next.js, HTML/CSS, Tailwind **Backend & Cloud, Advanced** Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker ## Experience ### Senior Software Engineer Lead engineer for the platform team, owning core API infrastructure. #### Highlights * Reduced API latency by 45% through caching and query optimization * Designed microservices architecture serving 2M daily requests * Mentored 4 junior engineers through technical growth plans ### Full Stack Developer Built customer-facing web applications from prototype to production. #### Highlights * Built real-time dashboard used by 15,000+ daily active users * Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deploy time from 2 hours to 8 minutes ## Education ### Computer Science **University of Technology** (September 2013 - May 2017) Study type: Bachelor of Science
